description_long: This imposing stone castle features a symmetrical rectangular layout with two large square towers at each end and a central keep rising above the main structure. The walls are constructed from gray stone blocks, reinforced with prominent buttresses and topped with crenellated battlements. The roof is metallic and segmented, with a series of arched, golden-hued stained glass windows lining the sides, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise defensive architecture. The main entrance is accessed by a broad staircase and is flanked by tall, narrow windows, while the towers and keep are adorned with additional battlements. The overall design is reminiscent of Medieval Gothic castles, emphasizing both fortification and grandeur. The structure sits on a raised stone platform, further enhancing its prominence and defensive capabilities.
description: A grand, gray stone castle with two large towers, a central keep, crenellated battlements, and arched stained glass windows, all set on a raised platform. The design blends defensive features with elegant Gothic elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central keep, staircase, and two tall arched stained glass windows above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of arched stained glass windows, prominent buttresses, and the two large square towers at each end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a central keep, staircase, and arched windows, but lacking a visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, displaying the row of stained glass windows, buttresses, and towers.
